summary: Verified bug fix for certificate section not appearing for 'Certificado catastral sencillo' petition type. Fix confirmed working - both test petitions now show certificate section correctly.

certificate_section_visibility.description: Certificate section now appears for petitions with tipo_tramite containing 'certificado catastral' (case-insensitive)
certificate_section_visibility.root_cause: PetitionDetail.js line 955 was using strict equality 'petition.tipo_tramite === "Certificado catastral"' which didn't match variants like 'Certificado catastral sencillo'
certificate_section_visibility.fix_applied: Changed to case-insensitive includes check: 'petition.tipo_tramite?.toLowerCase().includes("certificado catastral")'

code_review.line_798: petition.tipo_tramite?.toLowerCase().includes('certificado') - Shows certificate section for any type containing 'certificado'
code_review.line_955: petition.tipo_tramite?.toLowerCase().includes('certificado catastral') - Shows 'Generar Certificado' button for types containing 'certificado catastral' (case-insensitive)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Fix correctly implemented using case-insensitive includes() check
✓ Both test petitions with 'Certificado catastral sencillo' type now show certificate section
✓ Download and Regenerate buttons visible for already-generated certificates
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing petitions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified for certificate section visibility. The fix at PetitionDetail.js line 955 now uses case-insensitive includes() check instead of strict equality, allowing variants like 'Certificado catastral sencillo', 'Certificado Catastral', etc. to properly show the certificate generation/download section.
